title: Meesakaara Nanba Lyrics Natpukkaga
stanzas:
meesakaara nanba
unaku rosa adhigam da

meesakaara nanba
unaku rosa adhigam da
rosam adhigam da
adhavida paasam adhigam da

namma palaginadha marakkalaye
andha paruvam ippo
kedaikkalaye
adha kaatchigalukku naraiyillaye
innum kanna
vittuthaan marayalaye
meesakaara nanba

andha aaththangaya
kaettu paaru
meen pudichcha kadhaya
adhu sollum

andha panna maetta
kaettupaaru
paal karandha kadha
adhu solum

andha sola kaatta
kaettupaaru kodi
pudichcha kadha
adhu sollum

andha toorin taaxisa
kaettupaaru padam
paartha kadha adhu
sollum

karnam pottu kenathukkul
kudhichcha ninaivugal
malarudhu manasukkul
kulirudhu..

kamban koolu kudichidathaane
unarvugal thudikkudhu
meesayum thadhukkudhu

palaginadha marakkalaye
andha paruvam ippo
kedaikkalaye
adha kaatchigalukku naraiyillaye
innum kanna
vittuthaan marayalaye

peththa appana pola
akkara vachchi
senja sevaikkellaam
vilaiyillaye

andha anbu neranja
pulla paasam
ada unnapola than
enakkillaye…

indha veedhi mulukka
thoranam katti…
kann mulichathellaam
edhukkaaga..

naan peththa ponnuthaan
vazha vendi nee
ulachadhellaam enakkaaga

karnan pola kadamaya madhichu
dhinam dhinam ulachchavan
vervaya vadichchavan

paattukaaran bharathi sonna
kannana pola enakingu porandhavan

kannu renduthaan
kalangudhaiyyaa
enna punniyam senjen
unai adaiya

nandri kadan theerkka
enna koduppen
un velakkaaranaaga
vandhu porappen..

meesakaara nanba
unaku rosa adhigam da

meesakaara nanba
unaku rosa adhigam da
rosam adhigam da
adhavida paasam adhigam da

namma palaginadha marakkalaye
andha paruvam ippo
kedaikkalaye
adha kaatchigalukku naraiyillaye
innum kanna
vittuthaan marayalaye

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

Meesakaara Nanba conveys themes of friendship and affection, celebrating the joy of companionship.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

In Natpukkaga, the song highlights the strong bonds between friends, enhancing the emotional depth of the narrative.

Who is the singer and music director of this song?

The song is sung by Deva, who is also the music director, showcasing his multifaceted talent.

When was the song released?

Meesakaara Nanba was released on June 25, 1998, making it a memorable track from the late 90s.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Meesakaara Nanba, the song beautifully encapsulates the spirit of friendship and the joy it brings. Set against the backdrop of Natpukkaga, it conveys a sense of nostalgia and happiness, resonating with listeners who value their relationships. The heartfelt lyrics by Kavignar Kalidasan, combined with Deva's melodious voice, evoke emotions that celebrate life's simple pleasures. This track is a perfect anthem for celebrations and gatherings, making it a cherished favorite among fans.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Meesakaara Nanba from Natpukkaga is a delightful melody that captures the essence of friendship and joy. With Deva's soulful voice and heartfelt lyrics by Kavignar Kalidasan, this song resonates with anyone who cherishes their bonds. Experience the nostalgic vibes that make this track a timeless favorite!
stanzaMeanings: You have a lot of anger, my friend.
You have a lot of anger, my friend; there’s a lot of anger, and even more love.
We can’t forget our past; that time is now lost, and there are no more sights to see, still hiding from the eyes.
You have a lot of anger, my friend.
Look at that fish caught by the net; it tells a story.
Listen to that tale of the milk spilling; it tells a story.
Listen to that tale of the flag caught; it tells a story.
Listen to that tale of the tax collector; it tells a story when you see the film.
Thoughts bloom in the heart when you pour in memories.
Feelings awaken when you drink from the pot; the mustache also feels it.
We can’t forget our past; that time is now lost, and there are no more sights to see, still hiding from the eyes.
Like a father who has a child, all the work done is worthless.
That love-filled boy’s affection is not like yours for me…
This street is decorated for you; all the eyes are closed for that.
I need to live for the girl I gave birth to; you must live for me.
Like Karna, who was strong, day by day he grew stronger and stronger.
The singer Bharathi said, like a child born to me.
With both eyes, I am amazed; what good deed did I do to deserve you?
I will come to repay your kindness, as a worker in your field.
You have a lot of anger, my friend.
You have a lot of anger, my friend; there’s a lot of anger, and even more love.
We can’t forget our past; that time is now lost, and there are no more sights to see, still hiding from the eyes.
